title: Set up GraphQL with Apollo Server and Apollo Client in Next.js
summary: Install Apollo Server 4 and Apollo Client, create a typed GraphQL API route in Next.js App Router, write resolvers, and query data from React components.
declaration: I will set up a GraphQL API using Apollo Server 4 in this Next.js project, with Apollo Client for data fetching in React components. This uses the App Router fetch handler pattern. If you prefer a different GraphQL server (Yoga, Pothos, Nexus) or client (urql, URQL), say so before I begin.
